title: Applied Insights: the state of AI and design (Option 1)
speakers: Andrew Hogan (Head of Insights, Figma), Shane Johnston (Researcher, Figma), Christa Simon (Manager, Research, Figma)
key_points: Figma's research team (Andrew Hogan, Shane Johnston, and Christa Simon) presents key findings from the newly-released 2026 AI report, unpacking three years of AI trends in design.
The session focuses on three themes: where AI's impact is accelerating, how investment is shifting, and what is actually changing about how teams work together.
The talk is interactive, inviting participants to react, compare their own experiences, and pressure-test which AI practices are genuinely sticking in real-world work.
Offered on both days of the conference, the session emphasizes evidence-based insights over hype, distinguishing durable changes from passing trends.
